prompt: Recolor ONLY the flat solid background of this 2D cartoon game icon to a deep dark red (dark crimson, approximately #7A1F1F) solid color. The input is a flat 2D illustrated game asset with bold black outlines, flat cel-shaded color blocks, simple graphic shapes, and a plain uniform background. Preserve this exact 2D icon style 100% identical to the input: keep the subject/character, bold black outlines, flat colors, cel-shading, hard edges, line weights, and graphic flatness completely unchanged. Your ONLY change is the uniform background fill color. Do NOT transform the 2D icon into a 3D render, realistic object, or photograph. Do NOT add realistic material, texture, depth, volumetric lighting, physical shading, or soft gradients. Do NOT remove, thin, or soften the outlines. Do NOT alter, recolor, restyle, or reimagine any foreground content, character, or object. Do NOT change the brightness, contrast, saturation, or color balance of the foreground subject. Do NOT add, remove, or move any foreground element. Output the exact same 2D cartoon game icon with ONLY the background color changed. No new watermark, no text, no border, no crop.
prompt_zh: 仅将这张 2D 卡通游戏图标的纯色背景重新着色为深暗红色（深绯红，约 #7A1F1F）纯色。输入图为扁平化 2D 插画游戏素材，带有粗黑描边、平涂色块/赛璐珞上色、简洁图形轮廓，背景为均匀纯色。必须严格保持这种 2D 图标风格与输入 100% 一致：主体/角色、粗黑描边、平涂颜色、硬边、线宽、图形扁平化均完全不变。你唯一的改动是背景纯色的填充颜色。不得把 2D 图标变成 3D 渲染、写实物体或照片。不得添加写实材质、纹理、景深、体积光、实体阴影或柔和渐变。不得删除、变细或柔化描边。不得修改、重新着色、改变风格或重新想象任何前景内容、角色或物体。不得改变前景主体的亮度、对比度、饱和度或色彩平衡。除背景色外，不得添加、删除或移动任何前景元素。输出与原图完全相同的 2D 卡通游戏图标，仅背景颜色被更改。不出现新水印、无文字、无边框、不裁切。
